items.title_en: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
items.title_zh: 芝商所 (CME) 特里·达菲 (Terry Duffy) 将于 2027 年辞职，首席财务官林恩·菲茨帕特里克 (Lynne Fitzpatrick) 将出任首席执行官
items.desc_en: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 该公司周三表示，现年 67 岁的达菲将于 2027 年 3 月 1 日起担任执行董事长。

items.title_en: Fed meeting live updates: Here's everything to expect from Kevin Warsh's first rate decision
items.title_zh: 美联储会议实时更新：以下是凯文·沃什首次利率决定中值得期待的一切
items.desc_en: The Federal Reserve’s rate decision on Wednesday marks the first one with Kevin Warsh at the helm.
items.desc_zh: 美联储周三的利率决定是凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 掌舵的第一个利率决定。

items.title_en: More united Fed board seen at Warsh's first meeting, according to Kalshi traders
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，沃什的第一次会议上美联储董事会更加团结
items.desc_en: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi largely forecast a unanimous decision among FOMC members at Wednesday's meeting, after April's divided vote.
items.desc_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员在很大程度上预测，在 4 月份的投票结果存在分歧后，联邦公开市场委员会 (FOMC) 成员将在周三的会议上做出一致决定。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 周三股市最值得关注的 10 件事
items.desc_en: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh hold his first post-meeting press conference, and Broadcom gets an "aggressive" buy recommendation.
items.desc_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）举行了他的第一次会后新闻发布会，博通获得了“积极”的买入建议。

items.title_en: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
items.title_zh: 躲避比特币的“被动”投资者现在被迫拥有 SpaceX，该公司的波动性是其三倍
items.desc_en: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions
items.desc_zh: 许多顾问和资金经理投资了指数基金，这些基金很快将成为埃隆·马斯克天文野心的所有者

items.title_en: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
items.title_zh: Carvana的新车战略将经销店变成“游乐场”、试驾中心，销售全部在线进行
items.desc_en: But don't expect Carvana to sell you a vehicle at one of its seven Stellantis stores, marking a stark contrast from typical franchised dealers.
items.desc_zh: 但不要指望 Carvana 会在其七家 Stellantis 商店之一向您出售车辆，这与典型的特许经销商形成鲜明对比。

items.title_en: Anthropic asked for regulation. Washington went much further
items.title_zh: 人择要求监管。华盛顿走得更远
items.desc_en: Anthropic has long been supportive of AI regulation, but the Trump administration is coming down particularly hard on the AI company.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 长期以来一直支持人工智能监管，但特朗普政府对人工智能公司的态度尤其严厉。

items.title_en: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Netflix, Broadcom, Micron, Lyft, AMD, Figma & more
items.title_zh: 以下是周三最重要的分析师电话会议：Nvidia、Tesla、Netflix、Broadcom、Micron、Lyft、AMD、Figma 等
items.desc_en: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 以下是周三华尔街最大的呼吁。

items.title_en: Leader of South Africa's second biggest party wants his predecessor sacked as minister
items.title_zh: 南非第二大党领袖希望解除前任部长职务
items.desc_en: John Steenhuisen is one of South Africa's best-known politicians after leading the DA for seven years.
items.desc_zh: 约翰·史汀惠森 (John Steenhuisen) 领导民主联盟七年，是南非最著名的政治家之一。

items.title_en: Bolivia signs $20m deal with US to fight drug trafficking, foreign ministry says
items.title_zh: 玻利维亚外交部称与美国签署2000万美元打击贩毒协议
items.desc_en: Under its new president, Bolivia is re-establishing severed ties with the US to combat organised crime.
items.desc_zh: 在新总统的领导下，玻利维亚正在重建与美国断绝的关系，以打击有组织犯罪。

items.title_en: BMW stock slumps to 5-year low as Iran war and China slowdown spark profit warning
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争和中国经济放缓引发盈利预警，宝马股价跌至五年低点
items.desc_en: BMW blamed a slowdown in its Chinese market, as well as disruption from the Iran war, as two reasons for the slashed guidance.
items.desc_zh: 宝马将下调指导意见的两个原因归咎于中国市场的放缓以及伊朗战争的干扰。

items.title_en: G7 leaders to boost Ukraine air defences, tighten sanctions on Russia - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 七国集团领导人将加强乌克兰防空，加强对俄罗斯的制裁 - 半岛电视台

items.desc_zh: 七国集团领导人将加强乌克兰防空，加强对俄罗斯的制裁 半岛电视台 特朗普在七国集团上对乌克兰的战争目标表示热情，称“我是老大”

items.title_en: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者
items.desc_en: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.
items.desc_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周三在七国集团会议上表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: CNBC to simulcast 11 WNBA games this season
items.title_zh: CNBC 将联播本赛季 11 场 WNBA 比赛
items.desc_en: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.
items.desc_zh: 这些联播将在 CNBC 上向富裕的观众展示 WNBA，并标志着这家商业新闻网络从康卡斯特分拆出来后翻开了新的篇章。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates are now falling but demand is still weaker
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率正在下降，但需求仍然疲弱
items.desc_en: A mixed week for mortgage rates resulted in less demand from both current homeowners and potential homebuyers.
items.desc_zh: 本周抵押贷款利率好坏参半，导致当前房主和潜在购房者的需求减少。

items.title_en: Abercrombie & Fitch begins selling third-party shoe brands in latest bid to chase growth
items.title_zh: Abercrombie & Fitch 开始销售第三方鞋履品牌，以追逐增长
items.desc_en: Abercrombie & Fitch's explosive growth has slowed, leading the apparel retailer to expand into new categories to boost sales
items.desc_zh: Abercrombie & Fitch 的爆炸式增长已经放缓，导致这家服装零售商拓展新品类以提高销售额

items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.title_zh: 赤道几内亚政府因未能实现目标而辞职

items.title_en: Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch
items.title_zh: Rivian 在 R2 推出期间解雇了数百名员工
items.desc_en: Rivian said Tuesday it was laying off hundreds of workers, or less than 2% of its workforce.
items.desc_zh: Rivian 周二表示，将解雇数百名员工，占员工总数不到 2%。

items.title_en: German broadcaster removes TV intro after Elon Musk takes legal action
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克采取法律行动后，德国广播公司删除了电视简介
items.desc_en: ZDF TV responded to a "cease and desist" letter after the tech trillionaire condemned the broadcaster's "outrageous lies".
items.desc_zh: 在这位科技亿万富翁谴责该广播公司“令人发指的谎言”后，德国电视二台（ZDF TV）对一封“停止和停止”的信做出了回应。

items.title_en: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.title_zh: 英国调查报告称俄罗斯军舰在英吉利海峡附近的游艇附近鸣枪示警
items.desc_en: BBC News understands the yacht had drifted towards the Admiral Grigorovich, a Russian frigate which has been operating in the Channel.
items.desc_zh: 据英国广播公司新闻了解，这艘游艇已漂向一直在英吉利海峡执行任务的俄罗斯护卫舰格里戈罗维奇海军上将号。

items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: Under-16s will be banned from social media from early 2027
items.title_zh: 从 2027 年初起，16 岁以下青少年将被禁止使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.title_en: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令——大胆而直率，但没有灵丹妙药
items.desc_en: The BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman on the big changes coming down the line for young people online.
items.desc_zh: BBC 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 讲述年轻人上网即将发生的重大变化。

items.title_en: What is the UK social media ban for under-16s?
items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。

items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 跃升为万亿富翁——图表
items.desc_en: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.
items.desc_zh: BBC 详细分析了这位科技大亨的财富是如何增长的。

items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person - and might even soon become a trillionaire.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界首富，甚至可能很快成为万亿富翁。

items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_zh: 科技生活

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。
